## Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the summary (no drive-by refactors)
- [ ] No secrets, signing material, or `.env` files in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior or config changes (`README`, `docs/`, skill docs)
- [ ] User-facing copy / i18n (en + zh-cn) updated if needed
- [ ] Unit/integration coverage added or updated when practical
- [ ] Breaking changes called out (migration notes if needed)
- [ ] CI green on this PR

## Test plan

- [ ] Happy path
- [ ] Edge cases / failure modes
- [ ] Signed-out vs signed-in (if auth-related)
- [ ]
